title: National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework (NEED): anonymised data 2025
body: "These documents present updated record level data created from the National Energy Efficiency Data-Framework (NEED):   the 50,000 row dataset is small enough to use in spreadsheet software the 4 million row dataset is a larger sample of the same NEED dataset the metadata spreadsheet describes the fields included in both tables   Please forward any feedback to energyefficiency.stats@energysecurity.gov.uk.  "

taxons.title: Energy and climate change: evidence and analysis
